qa_pairs.question: When will my sponsored role be activated after my renewal request?
qa_pairs.answer: Your role should be activated as soon as your sponsor renews their account and confirms your role. Your account will only be activated once your sponsor confirms that your role is continuing AND renews their own account.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have questions or need help with my sponsored role activation?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have any questions or need help, please email renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I made a mistake and renewed my Alliance account with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: You should create a new role with your current information and update your account. Log into CCDB, go to 'My Account' in the main menu, and then select 'Apply for a new role'. Follow the instructions to select your new role.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to my old role if I create a new one after renewing my Alliance account with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: Your old role will automatically expire and be deactivated on the morning of June 11, 2025, if it is not renewed.

qa_pairs.question: How does my sponsor confirm a new role when I apply for it?
qa_pairs.answer: Your sponsor will receive an email with a link to a page where they can confirm your new role.

qa_pairs.question: How can I add multiple roles to my Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: If you want to have several roles, you can add a new role by going to https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role and clicking on 'disable old roles' on that page.

qa_pairs.question: Can I have multiple primary roles if I have several roles on my Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: No, it is possible to submit several applications for roles, but you can only set one of them as your primary role.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I am trying to reactivate an old sponsored role but my sponsor cannot confirm it?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca so that we can assist you with your request.
